title: Skypiea Faces Final Judgment
description: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, this scene centers on Narrator, Enel, Nami, Luffy, Aisa. Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: In the name of our god, Enel,
